# STRAT.020 ? Crossing the Chasm (Moore)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Technology adoption lifecycle; early market vs mainstream; chasm between; whole product; beachhead strategy; bowling pin

## Application
Recognize adoption stages; focus on crossing chasm; create whole product; choose beachhead market; dominate niche then expand

## Key Values
- Adoption stages
- Chasm awareness
- Whole product
- Beachhead
- Sequential expansion

philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy
